# TKTokenDelegate

**Protocol**

The interface that a token delegate implements to respond to session creation events.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol TKTokenDelegate : NSObjectProtocol
```

## Delegate Methods

- **createSession(_:)**: Tells the delegate to create a session for the specified token.
- **token(_:terminateSession:)**: Tells the delegate to terminate the specified token session.

## Responding to Session Creation

- **delegate**: The token delegate.

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol

items.description: Tells the delegate to create a session for the specified token.
items.name: createSession(_:)

items.description: Tells the delegate to terminate the specified token session.
